positive: Minimalist silhouette design of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features stylized, interwoven branches forming an ethereal canopy over abstract, glowing mushroom formations and delicate fauna like fox spirits. Use deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and soft lilac gradients, contrasted by crisp, white bioluminescent highlights. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, emphasizing clean lines and negative space. Vector art style, highly detailed linework, tattoo flash aesthetic, suitable for direct print on fabric, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: photorealistic, messy, blurry, watermark, logo, text, artifact, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, noisy, smudge, gradient fade
